money_flow_summary: Organizations pay for security to prevent losses that dwarf the cost of protection. SMBs (5M+ US businesses) are the most underserved segment — easiest targets with almost no automated defenses.

opportunities.title: AI Compliance Automation for Startups (SOC 2 / HIPAA)
opportunities.how_money_is_made: AI agent guides startups through SOC 2 Type II or HIPAA: auto-collects evidence from AWS/GCP/GitHub/Slack, generates required policies (60+ docs), monitors for control failures, prepares auditor package. Charge $299–$999/mo. Vanta charges $1,500–$5,000/mo.
opportunities.moat: Audit history creates irreplaceable trail; cloud integrations create high switching cost
opportunities.first_step: Map all 64 SOC 2 controls to automatable evidence sources; build AWS + GitHub integration; find 3 seed-stage startups needing SOC 2
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI reads cloud configs and automatically generates SOC 2 control evidence — no manual log exporting

competitors.name: Vanta
competitors.weakness: $1,500–$5,000/mo minimum; enterprise-focused; expensive for seed/Series A startups; slow setup

competitors.name: Drata
competitors.weakness: $1,250–$2,000+/mo; same as Vanta — priced for Series B+ startups

competitors.name: Secureframe
competitors.weakness: $1,000–$2,500+/mo; still expensive; not meaningfully different from Vanta/Drata

opportunities.gap: Vanta, Drata, Secureframe all target $1,000+/mo price point. Seed-stage startups needing SOC 2 to close their first enterprise customer can't afford them. A $299/mo 'first SOC 2' product for early-stage startups is completely absent.
poc_steps: Post: 'I'll run your SOC 2 gap assessment for free — takes 1 hour'
Use AWS Config + GitHub API to pull their security posture data
Generate a 'here are your top 10 SOC 2 gaps' report

opportunities.title: AI Phishing Simulation & Micro-Training Platform
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Send AI-generated phishing simulations to employees (personalized with LinkedIn/company data), track clicks, deliver 2-min micro-training immediately. Charge $3–$8/employee/mo. 100-person company = $300–$800/mo.
opportunities.moat: Employee click history enables increasingly sophisticated tests over time
opportunities.first_step: Build email simulation platform with click tracking pixel; create 20 phishing templates; demo to 1 SMB IT manager
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI creates hyper-personalized phishing emails using OSINT — referencing real projects, manager name, current company news

competitors.name: KnowBe4
competitors.weakness: $20–$35/user/yr minimum (500-user minimum); enterprise-only; complex admin; overkill for SMBs

competitors.name: Proofpoint Security Awareness
competitors.weakness: Enterprise; expensive; requires security team to manage

opportunities.gap: KnowBe4 has a 500-user minimum. The 10–200 employee SMB market has no affordable phishing simulation tool. A $3/user/mo no-minimum solution is a complete gap in the market.
poc_steps: Build a simple email sending service with click tracking pixels (Mailgun + Bit.ly)
Create 5 phishing email templates (fake IT password reset, fake CEO email, fake benefits portal)
Run a 1-week simulation for a 20-person company (with written permission)
Report: '8 of 20 employees clicked' → sell the training
